name: Almond Poppy Bread (Eb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to your usual baking temperature.
2. In a large bowl, combine the water, bread flour, dry milk, salt, butter, lemon yogurt, honey, toasted almonds, lemon peel, poppy seeds, and lemon extract.
3. Mix until well combined.
4. Pour the mixture into a greased baking pan.
5. Cover with plastic wrap.
6. Place in the preheated oven and bake according to your usual settings.
